brief: Create an energetic Instagram reel that showcases our spring brunch menu, signature matcha pancakes, and the open-kitchen atmosphere. We want creators who can highlight food close-ups, group energy, and a clear callout for weekend reservations.

We need polished story-first content demonstrating our new overnight serum, before-and-after texture shots, and a short spoken reaction about why the product fits busy routines. Strong bathroom lighting and premium framing matter for this campaign.

Develop a carousel post that educates followers on our daily gut reset bundle with clean graphics, supplement benefits, and a simple wellness routine caption. We prefer creators with an evidence-based tone and strong caption writing.

Produce a city guide reel using our luggage in transit, hotel arrival, and packing transition shots. The brief should feel aspirational but practical, with creator-led narration that speaks to weekend travelers and organized packing habits.

Capture a three-frame story sequence promoting our guest pass week, showing the studio entrance, a trainer intro, and post-workout community energy. We want authentic local creators who can drive link taps and short-term conversions.

Shoot a cozy coffeehouse photo post featuring our seasonal pistachio latte, warm interior textures, and a caption that makes followers want to stop by during afternoon work sessions. Visual storytelling and still-life styling are important.

Create a fast-paced demo reel showing our skin tint application in natural light, finish comparisons, and the final look across a full day. We need creators who can blend tutorial clarity with premium beauty aesthetics.

Share quick story content around our new salad subscription, focusing on freshness, lunch convenience, and simple ordering. This campaign suits local lifestyle creators who can make healthy routines feel easy and realistic.

We are looking for an educational post or photo-led carousel about a realistic night routine using our repair cream. The tone should be calm, credible, and focused on ingredient storytelling rather than flashy transformation claims.

Film a high-energy reel centered on travel hydration, gym recovery, and how our electrolyte sticks fit inside a creator's everyday bag. Pacing should be upbeat with practical use cases and a strong opening hook.

Promote our weekend produce box with simple story slides, unboxing visuals, and a coupon swipe-up message. We are prioritizing neighborhood creators who speak naturally about meal prep, freshness, and family convenience.

Build a reel around our latest phone camera features with side-by-side clips, low-light shots, and an easy explanation of creator-first editing tools. The campaign should feel premium, sharp, and clearly useful for content creators.

Create a reel campaign for Atlas Kitchen focused on launching a seasonal offer. The content should emphasize close-up product storytelling, show how the brand fits naturally into a creator's routine, and give followers a reason to save the post.

Create a post campaign for Bright Studio focused on introducing a product refresh. The content should emphasize voiceover walkthroughs, show how the brand fits naturally into a creator's routine, and give followers a reason to book a visit.

Create a story campaign for Cinder Collective focused on promoting a limited-time drop. The content should emphasize authentic founder-led messaging, show how the brand fits naturally into a creator's routine, and give followers a reason to tap through to order.

Create a reel campaign for Drift Club focused on driving local foot traffic. The content should emphasize premium lifestyle framing, show how the brand fits naturally into a creator's routine, and give followers a reason to remember the brand at checkout.
